StructuredText.Text: Axis04 B - Delay reference point approach

LineComment.Text: B Rotation diseable when X Axis is in laser area
Shuttle EXT - Consigne SAS/INT - Sas EXT pas ouvert
Shuttle SAS - Consigne EXT - Sas EXT pas ouvert
Shuttle SAS - Consigne INT - Sas INT pas ouvert
Shuttle INT - Consigne SAS/EXT - Sas INT pas ouvert
Shuttle INT - Int loader in safe position
Shuttle EXT - Ext Loader in safe position
Shuttle EXT - Consigne SAS/INT - Sas EXT pas ouvert
Shuttle SAS - Consigne EXT - Sas EXT pas ouvert
Shuttle SAS - Consigne INT - Sas INT pas ouvert
Shuttle INT - Consigne SAS/EXT - Sas INT pas ouvert
Shuttle INT - Int loader in safe position
Shuttle EXT - Ext Loader in safe position

StructuredText.Text: Check if Key Safety Stop pressed

LineComment.Text: Asking dynamisation forced
Timer dynamisation forced : Begin
Reset dynamisation forcée
Timer dynamisation forced : End
Msg 700543 : SAFETY: TEST STOP ERROR

StructuredText.Text: Safe Brake Test Control (SBT) - Z axis
